codeReview.summary: Reviewed mission feature spec, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit a90f050. The commit adds Zod validation for POST /api/auth (including invalid JSON handling and non-empty string token checks) and fixes publish route typing/import issues by removing the unsafe cast path and using static encryptToken import. The dashboard prompt localStorage daily caching behavior and scoped route validation/auth expectations in this feature are satisfied in the reviewed repository state.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The transcript shows no agent-browser usage even though this feature's verification steps include a dashboard UI caching check and the fullstack-worker skill requires agent-browser for UI/manual verification.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature expectedBehavior/verificationSteps in mission features.json references dashboard load behavior; .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md step 5 requires agent-browser for UI features; worker-transcripts.jsonl for session 3376d6aa-22d5-43e2-9ad7-bde0db9f0b50 contains only read/grep/execute/curl flow with no agent-browser tool call.

summary: Pass: no blocking or non-blocking code defects were found in the reviewed implementation for this feature.
